dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Eunjang High. A school like any other, filled with the usual hierarchy. The strong rule, the weak obey. Or so they thought.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And then there was Gray Yeon. The quietest kid in class. The one who always had his nose in a book. The one everyone overlooked.

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 1
dialogue.line: Hey, isn't that Gray Yeon? He's always so quiet.

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 2
dialogue.line: Yeah, barely speaks. Probably scared of his own shadow.

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (They always talk. They always assume. It's fine. Let them.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: After class, the hallways emptied quickly. But some lingered. Like Min-jun and his crew, a group known for preying on the 'weak'.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS ECHO

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: Well, well, well. Look what we have here. The little bookworm, all alone.

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Min-jun. Known for his short temper and even shorter fuse. Predictable.)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: What's wrong, nerd? Cat got your tongue? Or are you just too busy calculating how many punches it'll take to knock you out?

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 1
dialogue.line: Heh, one good hit and he'll crumble.

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: I'm not interested in your games. Just leave me alone.

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: Oh, a tough guy now? You think you can just walk away from us?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB (Min-jun grabs Gray's arm)

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (His grip is tight. Standard. But his stance is off-balance. Predictable.)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: Let's teach this little punk a lesson about respect.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH (Gray ducks under Min-jun's swing)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: Huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Too slow. Too wide.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK (Gray slams his textbook into Min-jun's temple)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: AGH! What the—?!

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (A textbook. Hardcover. Enough force. Now, create distance.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PUSH (Gray shoves Min-jun, sending him stumbling)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 2
dialogue.line: Boss! You okay?

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: You little rat! I'm gonna break every bone in your body!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Anger makes him sloppy. Good.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Min-jun charged, a wild, unrefined punch aimed at Gray's head. But Gray wasn't fighting fair.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG (Gray yanks a fire extinguisher off the wall)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: What are you—?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: HISS (Gray sprays Min-jun directly in the face)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: GAH! MY EYES! I CAN'T SEE!

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 1
dialogue.line: Boss!

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Disorientation. Temporary blindness. Perfect.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHUMP (Gray uses the extinguisher to slam Min-jun against the wall)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (He's dazed. Now, the finish.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Gray didn't hesitate. He pulled a pen from his pocket. Not just any pen. A heavy, metal-cased one.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLICK (Pen cap removed)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 2
dialogue.line: Hey! What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Pressure points. Temples, neck, back of the hand. Small targets, big impact.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: JAB! (Gray jabs the pen into Min-jun's pressure point on the neck)

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun
dialogue.line: A-ACK! Ngh...!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Min-jun's eyes rolled back. His body went limp, sliding down the wall. Unconscious.

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 1
dialogue.line: Boss! He... he knocked him out with a pen!

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 2
dialogue.line: You psycho!

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (Two left. They're scared. Good.)

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: Do you want to end up like him?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GULP

dialogue.speaker: Min-jun's Crony 1
dialogue.line: N-no! We're leaving!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRAMBLE (Cronies drag Min-jun away, panicking)

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (They never learn. The strong aren't always the biggest. Or the loudest.)

dialogue.speaker: Gray Yeon
dialogue.line: (They just haven't figured out my rules yet.)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Gray Yeon calmly picked up his fallen textbook, dusted it off, and walked away, leaving the lingering scent of extinguisher foam and fear in his wake.

summary: Gray Yeon, an unassuming student, is confronted by a bully named Min-jun and his cronies after school. Using his intelligence and unconventional tactics, Gray swiftly and brutally takes down Min-jun, leaving his friends terrified and the bully unconscious.
